description_long: This is a tall, free-standing cheval mirror with an arched top and a classic, elegant frame. The mirror is supported by two turned wooden posts on either side, each topped with a decorative finial, and is mounted on a sturdy base with curved feet for stability. The frame and support structure appear to be painted or finished in a light, neutral color, giving it a refined and timeless look. The mirror itself is large and vertically oriented, suitable for full-body reflection. The design features subtle carved details at the top and bottom, enhancing its traditional aesthetic. This type of mirror is often found in bedrooms, dressing rooms, or entryways, providing both functional and decorative value.
description: A tall, arched cheval mirror with a classic frame, supported by turned posts and curved feet in a light finish. It features decorative finials and subtle carved details, ideal for full-body reflection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full reflective surface, arched top, and decorative frame with both support posts and finials visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, turned posts, and the curved feet that provide stability.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the mirror and frame, with the support structure and decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thinness of the mirror and the design of the support legs.
attribute_frame_design: Classic arched frame with turned wooden posts, decorative finials, and subtle carved details, finished in a light color.
